deprecated_yaml_import_issue.description:
Configuring NX584 using YAML is deprecated.

While importing your configuration, an error occurred when trying to connect to the NX584 panel. Please restart Home Assistant to try again, or remove the existing YAML configuration and set the integration up via the UI.
deprecated_yaml_import_issue.title: NX584 YAML configuration deprecated

error.invalid_zone_options: Exclude zones must be a list of zone numbers, and zone types must be a mapping of zone numbers to binary sensor device classes.

data_description.exclude_zones: List of zone numbers to exclude from Home Assistant, for example: 2, 7.
data_description.zone_types: Mapping of zone numbers to a binary sensor device class, for example: zone 3 mapped to motion. Zones not listed default to opening.

bypass.description: Bypasses the zone represented by this sensor.
bypass.name: Bypass

zone.description: The number of the zone to be bypassed.
zone.name: Zone

unbypass.description: Un-bypasses the zone represented by this sensor.
unbypass.name: Un-bypass

zone.description: The number of the zone to be un-bypassed.
zone.name: [%key:component::nx584::services::bypass_zone::fields::zone::name%]
